title: Pin
description: A single pin of an electronic component with its electrical characteristics and functions

number.description: Physical pin number as printed on the component package

name.description: Pin name as printed in the datasheet (e.g. SCL, GPIO1, VCC)

open_drain.description: True if pin is open-drain/open-collector; requires an external pull-up resistor

must_connect.description: True if pin must be connected and cannot be left floating. Common for RESET, BOOT, and VCC pins.

rail.description: ID of the power rail this pin belongs to (references a rail defined in the component's rails array)

net.description: Explicit net name override for this pin

voltage_level.description: Nominal logic voltage level of the pin

electrical.description: Detailed electrical characteristics from the datasheet (V_IH, V_IL, etc.)

primary_function.description: Primary logical function of this pin

alternate_functions.description: Alternate peripheral functions available when this pin is configured as GPIO

required_external.description: Passive components that must be placed externally for this pin to operate correctly (e.g. pull-up resistors, bypass capacitors)

remark.description: Free-form note about this pin (e.g. must be tied to GND, do not exceed 1.8V, connects to external crystal)
